findings.description: The source h2 section '作成手順' contains >= 2000 chars of plain text and has two distinct h3 subsections ('View(JSP)の作成' and '更新画面初期表示までの実装'), but the knowledge file combines both into a single section s2 rather than splitting them into separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under 作成手順: 'View(JSP)の作成' (with 画面イメージ, 概要, パラメータをサブミットするリンクの作成方法 as h4 subsections) and '更新画面初期表示までの実装' (with a full Java code example). Together these well exceed 2000 characters of plain text.
